meaning: n.[希神][罗神]勒达(斯巴达之后,主神Zeus化为天鹅与之作爱,生Pollux和Helen)
examples: The daughter of Zeus and Leda and wife of Menelaus.
Leda feels the beating of the swan's heart, and that heart is "strange" to her, that simple, powerful word.
Leda Bolden, 39, from Waterloo Road, Bedford, was last seen on the evening of Easter Sunday.
As part of an NPR series on fashion, Leda Hartman takes a look at latest trends in textile technology.
About her daughters Leda has ambivalent and often sharply hostile thoughts.
